footer.tagline: AI-powered client intake for accounting professionals.
index.heroTitle: Your Next Client Intake Runs Itself.
index.heroSubtitle: SoloAccountantAI handles client intake by chat, phone, or website widget — captures every detail about their financial situation and service needs, and delivers a structured engagement summary with AI context notes — so you're prepared before the first meeting.
index.beFirst: Be the first to know when we launch
index.pain.title: Sound familiar?
index.pain.subtitle: Solo accountants lose time and prospective clients to the same three problems every day.
index.pain.item1.title: Tax season paper chase
index.pain.item1.body: A new client calls during filing season. You're buried in returns. They leave a voicemail asking about S-Corp election. By the time you call back between deadlines, they've hired someone else.
index.pain.item2.title: Every meeting starts from zero
index.pain.item2.body: You spend the first 15 minutes of every new client meeting learning basics — entity type, revenue range, filing states, outstanding issues — that you could have captured before they sat down.
index.pain.item3.title: After-hours deadline panic
index.pain.item3.body: A business owner realizes at 9pm they haven't filed quarterly estimates. They search for accountants, find your website, and have no way to explain their situation. They call the first firm with a live answering service instead.
index.features.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
index.features.subtitle: Six powerful capabilities that transform how solo accountants manage new clients.
index.features.aiIntake.title: AI Client Intake
index.features.aiIntake.body: A branded AI assistant collects every detail you need — via chat, form, or website widget, in English or Spanish — while you focus on your clients' returns.
index.features.phoneIntake.title: AI Phone Intake
index.features.phoneIntake.body: A dedicated phone number where clients speak naturally with your AI assistant. Every call becomes a structured summary — 24/7, no hold music.
index.features.summary.title: Engagement Summary & AI Notes
index.features.summary.body: Every intake lands in your inbox as a structured summary with AI-generated context: entity analysis, filing complexity flags, and suggested follow-up questions.
index.features.docIntel.title: Document Intelligence
index.features.docIntel.body: Request documents from clients, receive secure uploads, and get AI-powered summaries extracting key figures from W-2s, 1099s, bank statements, and prior returns.
index.features.aiBrief.title: AI Intelligence Brief
index.features.aiBrief.body: Every intake generates a deep-dive analysis — filing complexity assessment, multi-state considerations, entity-type optimization opportunities, and deduction flags.
index.features.marketing.title: Marketing Kit
index.features.marketing.body: Generate platform-ready social posts and branded visual cards for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Nextdoor — in seconds.
index.howItWorks.title: Up and running in minutes
index.howItWorks.subtitle: From first login to receiving your first intake — three simple steps.
index.howItWorks.step1.title: Set up your profile
index.howItWorks.step1.desc: Upload your logo, set your assistant's name, add your specialties and intake questions, and get your unique client intake link — in under 10 minutes.
index.howItWorks.step2.title: Share your intake link
index.howItWorks.step2.desc: Add it to your website, email signature, social profiles, or anywhere you connect with clients. Your AI handles every conversation — 24/7.
index.howItWorks.step3.title: Review and respond
index.howItWorks.step3.desc: Get a structured summary with AI context notes the moment a client submits. Know their entity type, revenue range, filing needs, and the right questions before your first meeting.
index.dualBenefit.title: Better for You. Better for Clients.
index.dualBenefit.subtitle: When your intake runs smarter, everyone wins — you reclaim your time, and clients get the responsive, prepared experience they deserve.
index.dualBenefit.step1.label: Client Reaches Out
index.dualBenefit.step1.youBody: Intake runs 24/7 — nights, weekends, tax season. Every prospective client is captured the moment they reach out.
index.dualBenefit.step1.clientTitle: Get help the moment you need it
index.dualBenefit.step1.clientBody: No voicemail, no waiting until Monday. Reach out at 11pm when you realize quarterly estimates are due and get an immediate, professional response.
index.dualBenefit.step2.label: AI Conversation
index.dualBenefit.step2.youBody: Structured intake with entity type, revenue, filing history, and service needs — no scribbled notes, no missed details, no 15-minute fact-finding at the first meeting.
index.dualBenefit.step2.clientBody: No intimidating forms. A warm, professional conversation that feels like talking to a real person — so you can explain exactly what financial help you need.
index.dualBenefit.step3.label: Accountant Reviews
index.dualBenefit.step3.youTitle: Walk into every meeting fully prepared
index.dualBenefit.step3.youBody: AI-generated engagement brief with entity analysis, filing complexity flags, and suggested advisory questions — before the client even arrives.
index.dualBenefit.step3.clientTitle: Your accountant already understands your situation
index.dualBenefit.step3.clientBody: No repeating yourself. Your first real conversation starts where it should — with strategy, recommendations, and next steps.
index.dualBenefit.step4.label: First Meeting
index.dualBenefit.step4.youBody: Spend your time on advisory and strategy — not copying intake notes from voicemail or chasing down basic financial information.
index.dualBenefit.step4.clientTitle: A faster path to financial clarity
index.dualBenefit.step4.clientBody: From "I need an accountant" to a prepared consultation — faster than you thought possible. The sophistication of a large firm with the personal attention of a solo practitioner.
index.dualBenefit.tagline: Great client relationships start before the first meeting.

index.closing.title: Your intake runs while you're preparing returns.
index.closing.subtitle: Stop losing new clients to missed calls and after-hours gaps. Chat, phone, and document intake — always on, always branded, always ready.
features.pageSubtitle: Intake by chat, phone, or widget. AI document analysis. Marketing tools. Everything you need — without adding overhead or hiring staff.
features.aiIntake.title: Intake That Runs Itself
features.aiIntake.desc: Clients get a conversational AI intake or a structured form — in English or Spanish. You get the details you need. No phone tag, no back-and-forth, no scheduling required on your end.
features.aiIntake.bullet1: Conversational AI chat mode and structured form mode
features.aiIntake.bullet2: Give your AI assistant a name — clients meet "Avery" or "Taylor," not a generic bot
features.aiIntake.bullet3: Bilingual — clients choose English or Spanish at the start
features.aiIntake.bullet4: Fully customizable intake questions tailored to your specialties
features.aiIntake.bullet5: Your disclaimer presented to every client before they begin
features.aiIntake.bullet6: Your logo, practice name, and greeting — clients never see SoloAccountantAI
features.summary.title: Know the Engagement Before the Meeting
features.summary.desc: Every submission arrives with a structured client summary and AI-generated context notes — flagging entity-type considerations, multi-state filing complexity, deduction opportunities, and suggested follow-up questions — so you're prepared the moment the client sits down.
features.summary.bullet1: Organized client profile: name, contact, location, and financial details
features.summary.bullet2: AI contextual notes — entity analysis, filing complexity, and advisory suggestions — for your eyes only
features.summary.bullet3: Suggested follow-up questions tailored to the financial situation
features.summary.bullet4: Delivered to your inbox the moment intake is submitted
features.summary.bullet5: Client receives a clean, branded confirmation with their submission summary
features.phoneIntake.title: AI Phone Intake — 24/7
features.phoneIntake.desc: Give your practice a dedicated phone number where callers speak naturally with your AI assistant. No hold music, no phone trees — just a professional conversation that captures every detail and delivers the same structured summary as chat intake.
features.phoneIntake.bullet1: Dedicated local phone number for your practice
features.phoneIntake.bullet2: Callers speak naturally — your AI assistant guides the conversation
features.phoneIntake.bullet3: Same structured summary, AI context notes, and email notifications
features.phoneIntake.bullet4: Available 24/7 — never miss an after-hours or weekend call
features.phoneIntake.bullet5: Intake source clearly labeled (Web Chat vs. Phone Call) in your portal
features.docIntel.title: Documents In, Insights Out
features.docIntel.desc: Request documents from clients with one click. AI recommends what to ask for based on the service type, clients upload securely, and every document is automatically analyzed — key figures, deductions, red flags, and an engagement-relevant summary — ready for your review.
features.docIntel.bullet1: AI recommends documents based on service type and financial details
features.docIntel.bullet2: Clients upload securely via a branded, encrypted portal
features.docIntel.bullet3: AI extracts key figures, income sources, and engagement-relevant highlights from each document
features.docIntel.bullet4: Handles PDFs, images, scanned documents, and Word files
features.docIntel.bullet5: 30-day secure retention — pass-through, not a vault
features.docIntel.bullet6: No human ever views client documents — fully automated
features.aiBrief.title: AI Intelligence Brief
features.aiBrief.desc: Every intake automatically generates a deep-dive analysis that goes beyond summarizing what the client said. The Intelligence Brief identifies filing complexity, multi-state considerations, entity-type optimization opportunities, and suggests the follow-up questions that matter most — so you walk into every meeting with the insight of a senior tax advisor.
features.aiBrief.bullet1: Filing complexity assessment — flags multi-state, international, or entity-change scenarios
features.aiBrief.bullet2: Entity-type analysis with optimization opportunities based on revenue and structure
features.aiBrief.bullet3: Deduction and credit flags with recommended actions
features.aiBrief.bullet4: Suggested follow-up questions tailored to the specific financial situation
features.aiBrief.bullet5: Delivered alongside the intake summary — no extra step required
features.brand.title: Your Brand, Your Link
features.brand.desc: Clients never see "SoloAccountantAI." They see your practice name, your logo, and your intake page — at a URL you control. Every detail is configurable from your admin portal, and when they're ready to meet, send a one-click consultation invite.
features.brand.bullet2: Upload your practice logo — shown on every client-facing screen and email
features.brand.bullet3: Set your assistant's name, client greeting, and specialty focus
features.brand.bullet4: Configure disclaimers in English and Spanish
features.brand.bullet5: Pause intake instantly with a custom unavailability message
features.brand.bullet6: Send consultation invites via Calendly or any scheduling link
features.marketing.title: Look Professional Online, Instantly
features.marketing.desc: The Marketing Kit generates platform-ready social media posts and professionally branded visual cards in seconds — tailored to your practice, your specialties, and your intake link. No designer. No copywriter. No extra tools.
features.marketing.bullet1: AI-written post copy for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Nextdoor
features.marketing.bullet2: Branded visual cards pre-sized for every platform — download as PNG, ready to upload
features.marketing.bullet3: Edit the card headline (AI-suggested, fully customizable) to match your voice
features.marketing.bullet4: 5 color themes — or use your brand color pulled automatically from your logo
features.marketing.bullet5: Website banner sizes included for your practice's website
features.marketing.bullet6: Generate in English or Spanish — bilingual from the start
features.integrations.title: Connect to the Tools You Already Use
features.integrations.desc: Every completed intake can automatically flow to your CRM, your spreadsheets, your project management tools — wherever you need it. No copy-pasting, no manual data entry, no switching between tabs.
features.integrations.bullet1: HubSpot CRM — connect your free HubSpot account and every intake automatically creates a contact with full details and AI context notes
features.integrations.bullet2: Zapier & Make — add a webhook URL and every intake fires to 6,000+ apps: Google Sheets, Slack, Mailchimp, and more
features.integrations.bullet3: Custom webhooks — send intake data to any endpoint with HMAC-signed payloads for security
features.integrations.bullet4: Calendly — send one-click consultation invites with personalized booking links
features.integrations.bullet5: Connect and disconnect in seconds — no developer required
features.blog.title: AI Blog Posts That Bring Clients to You
features.blog.desc: Generate SEO-optimized blog posts tailored to your practice, your specialties, and your location — in seconds. Each post comes with a title, article, meta description, keywords, and a ready-to-post social media teaser. Content marketing without the content struggle.
features.blog.bullet1: AI-suggested topics based on your specialty and location
features.blog.bullet2: Full SEO-optimized article (600-800 words) with meta description and keywords
features.blog.bullet3: Social media teaser ready to post on any platform
features.blog.bullet5: Copy any section with one click — paste directly to your website or social
features.transcripts.title: Full Conversation History
features.transcripts.desc: Every intake conversation — chat or phone — is preserved as a complete transcript. See exactly what your client said, how the AI guided the conversation, and review the full context before the consultation. Nothing gets lost in translation.
features.transcripts.bullet1: Full chat bubble view of every conversation
features.transcripts.bullet2: Chat and phone intake transcripts in one place
features.transcripts.bullet3: Review before the meeting — see exactly what the client described
features.transcripts.bullet4: Source label: Web Chat vs. Phone Call
features.admin.title: Admin Portal
features.admin.desc: Review every submission, track status, manage documents, and triage your client pipeline in one place.
features.admin.bullet4: Chat and phone intake unified view
features.email.title: Email Notifications
features.email.desc: You and your client both get a confirmation the moment an intake is submitted.
features.security.title: Security & Data Protection
features.security.desc: Enterprise-grade security with AI-powered data boundary enforcement.
features.security.bullet1: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS in transit
features.security.bullet2: AI detects and blocks SSN, credit card, and government ID data in real time
features.security.bullet3: No human review — fully automated AI processing

benefits.heroTitle: Better for You. Better for Clients.
benefits.heroSubtitle: When your intake runs smarter, everyone wins. You reclaim your time and walk into every consultation prepared. Your clients get the responsive, professional experience they deserve — from the very first interaction.
benefits.journey.title: The Intake Journey
benefits.journey.subtitle: Follow a client from first contact to first consultation — and see how every step creates value for both sides.
benefits.step1.label: Client Reaches Out
benefits.step1.youBody: Intake runs 24/7 — nights, weekends, tax season. Every prospective client is captured the moment they reach out. No more lost leads to voicemail or after-hours gaps.
benefits.step1.clientTitle: Get help the moment you need it
benefits.step1.clientBody: No voicemail, no waiting until Monday. Reach out at 11pm when you realize quarterly estimates are due and get an immediate, professional response. Your financial needs are heard on your schedule.
benefits.step2.label: AI Conversation
benefits.step2.youBody: Structured intake with all the facts you need — no scribbled notes, no missed details, no 15-minute fact-finding calls. Every answer organized and ready for review.
benefits.step2.clientBody: No intimidating forms. A warm, professional conversation that feels like talking to a real person — in English or Spanish. Share your financial situation at your own pace.
benefits.step3.label: Accountant Reviews
benefits.step3.youTitle: Walk into every meeting fully prepared
benefits.step3.youBody: AI-generated engagement brief with entity analysis, filing complexity flags, and advisory suggestions — before you ever open a spreadsheet. Know the client, the risks, and the right questions.
benefits.step3.clientTitle: Your accountant already understands your situation
benefits.step3.clientBody: No repeating yourself. No starting from zero. Your first real conversation starts where it should — with strategy, options, and next steps.
benefits.step4.label: First Consultation
benefits.step4.youBody: Spend your time on advisory and strategy — not copying intake notes from voicemail or chasing down basic financial information. Focus on practicing accounting.
benefits.step4.clientTitle: A faster path to financial clarity
benefits.step4.clientBody: From 'I need an accountant' to a prepared consultation — faster than you thought possible. The experience of a large firm with the personal attention of a solo practitioner.
benefits.additional.title: Every Feature, Two Winners
benefits.additional.subtitle: Beyond the intake journey, every capability in SoloAccountantAI creates a ripple effect — making your practice more efficient and your clients' experience more professional.
benefits.bilingual.title: Bilingual Intake
benefits.bilingual.youBody: Serve Spanish-speaking clients without hiring bilingual staff or paying for translation services.
benefits.bilingual.clientBody: Communicate in the language you're most comfortable in — from the very first interaction.
benefits.phone.title: AI Phone Intake
benefits.phone.youBody: A dedicated phone line that handles intake calls 24/7. Same structured summary, zero phone tag.
benefits.phone.clientBody: Prefer talking over typing? Call anytime and speak naturally — no hold music, no phone trees.
benefits.docIntel.title: Document Intelligence
benefits.docIntel.youBody: AI analyzes uploaded W-2s, 1099s, bank statements, and prior returns — extracting key figures and flags before you review.
benefits.docIntel.clientBody: A simple, secure way to share what's needed. Clear checklist, encrypted upload, no confusion.
benefits.triage.title: Triage & Deadline Detection
benefits.triage.youBody: Color-coded aging, filing deadline flags, and compliance alerts so you prioritize what matters most.
benefits.triage.clientBody: Time-sensitive deadlines get flagged and fast-tracked. Your urgent filing situation gets the attention it deserves.
benefits.security.title: Privacy & Security
benefits.security.youBody: End-to-end encryption, financial data confidentiality protections, and 30-day document retention with deletion rights.
benefits.security.clientBody: Your financial information is protected from the start. No human sees your data — fully automated, fully encrypted.
benefits.widget.title: Website Widget
benefits.widget.youBody: One line of code embeds intake directly on your WordPress or any website. Capture leads where they already are.
benefits.widget.clientBody: Start your intake without leaving your accountant's website. No new tabs, no separate portals, no friction.
benefits.aiBrief.title: AI Intelligence Brief
benefits.aiBrief.youBody: Every intake generates a deep-dive analysis — filing complexity, entity optimization, multi-state flags, deduction opportunities, and the follow-up questions that matter most.
benefits.aiBrief.clientBody: Your accountant spots potential savings and compliance risks specific to your situation — not just the one question you called about. Nothing falls through the cracks.
benefits.marketingKit.title: Marketing Kit
benefits.marketingKit.youBody: Generate branded social posts and visual cards for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Nextdoor in seconds — no designer, no copywriter needed.
benefits.marketingKit.clientBody: Find your accountant where you already browse — on social media, local directories, and community boards. One click starts your intake.
benefits.crm.title: CRM Integration
benefits.crm.youBody: Connect HubSpot (free) and every completed intake automatically creates a contact with full details and AI context notes. Zero manual data entry.
benefits.crm.clientBody: Your accountant has your information organized and ready before your first consultation. Faster follow-ups, fewer repeat questions.
benefits.zapier.title: Zapier & Webhooks
benefits.zapier.youBody: Send intake data to Google Sheets, Slack, Mailchimp, or any of 6,000+ apps automatically. Build the workflow that fits your practice.
benefits.zapier.clientBody: Your submission triggers the right actions immediately — appointment scheduling, welcome emails, or follow-up reminders — without anyone manually pushing buttons.
benefits.blogGen.title: AI Blog Generation
benefits.blogGen.youBody: Generate SEO-optimized blog posts tailored to your specialties and location. Each post comes with title, article, keywords, and a social media teaser — content marketing without the struggle.
benefits.blogGen.clientBody: Find helpful, expert financial content from a local accountant you can trust — not generic internet advice. When you're ready, your accountant is one click away.
benefits.bottom.title: The Real Difference
benefits.bottom.body: Solo accountants don't have intake coordinators, 24/7 answering services, or admin teams handling new client onboarding. Your clients don't know that — and with SoloAccountantAI, they'll never need to. Every interaction feels like a large firm with the personal attention only a solo practitioner can provide.
benefits.bottom.tagline: Great client relationships start before the first consultation.

pricing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pricing.faq.q1: What's included in the free trial?
pricing.faq.a1: Your 14-day free trial gives you full access to everything. A credit card is required at signup, but you won't be charged until day 15.
pricing.faq.a2: Each completed client intake submission counts as one intake. Incomplete sessions do not count. Limits reset monthly.
pricing.faq.q3: How does Document Intelligence work for tax documents?
pricing.faq.a3: After an intake, you can request specific documents (AI recommends what to ask for based on the client's situation). The client receives a branded email with a secure upload link. Once uploaded, AI automatically analyzes each document — extracting income figures, filing status, entity types, and key dates — so you have an organized brief before the first meeting.
pricing.faq.a4: Yes. Upgrade anytime with prorated billing. Downgrades take effect at your next billing period.
pricing.faq.a5: Yes. Cancel from your account settings. Access continues through the end of your billing period. No cancellation fees.
pricing.cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
pricing.cta.subtitle: SoloAccountantAI is coming Q3 2026. Join the waitlist to be first in line.
faq.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to know about SoloAccountantAI.
faq.how1.q: How does the AI client intake work?
faq.how1.a: When a prospective client visits your unique intake link, they're guided through a conversational intake experience. The AI asks about their financial situation, service needs (tax prep, bookkeeping, advisory), business type, and timeline. Answers are structured into a clean engagement summary delivered to your inbox.
faq.how2.q: What happens after a client submits?
faq.how2.a: You receive a detailed email with contact info, financial situation summary, and AI-generated insights (complexity flags, multi-state filing indicators, entity-type considerations). The client receives a confirmation email. All submissions are stored in your admin portal.
faq.how3.q: Does the AI give tax or financial advice?
faq.how3.a: No. The AI is strictly an intake tool. It doesn't provide tax advice, financial recommendations, or filing guidance. All AI-generated notes are internal analytical aids for your eyes only.
faq.how4.q: Does it handle both personal and business clients?
faq.how4.a: Yes. The AI adapts its questions based on whether the client needs personal tax prep, business accounting, payroll, advisory services, or multiple. Each path captures the relevant details for your review.
faq.setup1.a: Most accountants are set up within 10 minutes. Enter your firm name, upload your logo, select service specializations, write a greeting, add custom questions, and connect your scheduling link.
faq.setup2.a: Tax preparation, bookkeeping, payroll, business advisory, audit, forensic accounting, estate planning, nonprofit accounting, and more. You can also add custom specializations.
faq.billing1.q: Do you offer a free trial?
faq.billing1.a: Yes. 14-day free trial with full access. Credit card required but not charged until day 15.
faq.billing2.q: What is the difference between plans?
faq.billing2.a: Starter ($49/month) — 50 intakes, full intake system. Pro ($79/month) — 150 intakes + Marketing Kit. Pro+ ($119/month) — unlimited intakes + AI phone line + Document Intelligence.
faq.sec1.a: Yes. All data encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES-256). Client data scoped to your account. No data shared across accounts or used to train AI models. Financial information is treated with the highest level of care.
faq.support1.q: Is this only for solo accountants?
faq.support1.a: Built for solo practitioners and small firms. Each account is one accountant, one intake link, one inbox. Multi-partner firms can each set up individual accounts.
faq.support2.a: Reach us at sean@solosolutionsai.com. We respond within one business day. You can also use the contact form.
faq.cta.title: Still Have Questions?
faq.cta.subtitle: We're here to help.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.s1.p1: SoloSolutionsAI ("we," "our," or "us") operates a multi-vertical client intake automation platform serving solo practitioners and small businesses across multiple professions, including but not limited to: attorneys, therapists, social workers, veterinarians, realtors, accountants, insurance agents, and travel advisors. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard information when you use our platform at app.solosolutionsai.com and associated services (collectively, the "Service").
privacy.s1.p2: This policy applies to all users of the Service, including professionals who create accounts ("Professionals") and their clients who submit information through intake conversations ("Clients").
privacy.s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
privacy.s2.1.title: 2.1 Professional Account Information
privacy.s2.1.body: When a professional creates an account, we collect: full name, email address, business name, office city and state, phone number, profession/vertical, service areas or specialties, and optional business logo. Professionals may also configure: AI assistant name, client greeting, disclaimers (English and Spanish), intake questions, and scheduling preferences.
privacy.s2.2.title: 2.2 Client Intake Information
privacy.s2.2.body: Information submitted by clients through AI-powered chat conversations or phone intake includes: full name, email address, phone number (optional — clients may decline), city and state, primary concern or reason for inquiry, desired outcome, contact preference, and responses to profession-specific intake questions configured by the professional.
privacy.s2.3.title: 2.3 Conversation Transcripts
privacy.s2.3.body: Full transcripts of intake conversations (both chat and phone) are stored and made available to the professional through their admin portal. Transcripts include all messages exchanged between the client and the AI assistant during the intake session.
privacy.s2.4.title: 2.4 Uploaded Documents
privacy.s2.4.body: When a client uploads documents at the request of their professional, we collect the document files, file names, file types, and file sizes. Documents may include records, correspondence, identification, or other materials relevant to the client's matter. Providing documents is entirely voluntary.
privacy.s2.5.title: 2.5 Usage and Technical Data
privacy.s2.5.body: We collect standard technical information including: IP address, browser type, device type, pages visited, time spent, referring URLs, and similar analytics data through Google Analytics 4. This data is used to improve the Service and is not linked to individual client intake records.
privacy.s3.title: 3. Information We Refuse to Collect
privacy.s3.body: SoloSolutionsAI employs active data boundary enforcement. Our system is architecturally designed to detect and block the following categories of sensitive information in real time during intake conversations:
privacy.s3.ssn: Social Security Numbers (SSN) — detected and redacted automatically
privacy.s3.cc: Credit card numbers — detected and redacted automatically
privacy.s3.bank: Bank account and routing numbers — detected and redacted automatically
privacy.s3.govId: Government-issued ID numbers — detected and blocked
privacy.s3.footer: If a client volunteers any of this information during an intake conversation, the system detects the pattern, redacts the data from the transcript, does not store it, and gracefully redirects the conversation. This protection operates at the infrastructure level, not the policy level — meaning the system is structurally incapable of retaining this data, regardless of user input.
privacy.s4.title: 4. How We Use Your Information
privacy.s4.items: Provide, operate, and maintain the Service
Process client intake submissions and deliver them to the appropriate professional
Generate AI-powered intake summaries, context notes, and intelligence briefs
Analyze uploaded documents using AI to produce structured summaries for the professional
Send email notifications about new intake submissions to professionals and confirmation emails to clients
Generate AI-powered marketing content (blog posts, social media copy) at the professional's request
Sync intake data to third-party services (HubSpot, Zapier, webhooks) when configured by the professional
Provide consultation scheduling functionality via Calendly integration
Monitor platform health and performance via internal analytics
privacy.s5.title: 5. Third-Party Integrations and Data Sharing
privacy.s5.intro: SoloSolutionsAI integrates with third-party services. Data is shared with these services only when explicitly configured by the professional. We do not sell, rent, or share client data with third parties for their own marketing purposes.
privacy.s5.1.title: 5.1 HubSpot CRM
privacy.s5.1.body: When a professional connects their HubSpot account via OAuth, completed intake data (client name, email, phone, location, primary concern, desired outcome, contact preference, and AI context summary) is automatically sent to HubSpot to create or update a contact record. Data flows one way: from SoloSolutionsAI to HubSpot. The professional's HubSpot account is governed by HubSpot's own privacy policy and terms.
privacy.s5.2.title: 5.2 Webhooks (Zapier, Make, Custom Endpoints)
privacy.s5.2.body: Professionals may configure webhook URLs that receive intake data when a client completes an intake. The data payload includes: client name, email, phone, location, primary concern, desired outcome, contact preference, intake source, and vertical. Webhook payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 when a signing secret is configured. The professional is solely responsible for the security and privacy practices of their webhook endpoints and connected services.
privacy.s5.3.title: 5.3 Calendly
privacy.s5.3.body: When a professional connects Calendly, we store OAuth tokens to facilitate consultation invite emails. We do not access or store Calendly appointment data beyond the scheduling URL and event type.
privacy.s5.4.title: 5.4 AI Processing Services
privacy.s5.4.body: We use Anthropic (Claude) for AI-powered intake conversations, context summaries, intelligence briefs, document analysis, and blog post generation. Our AI provider does not retain, store, or use your data to train AI models. Data is processed in real time and discarded by the provider after the response is generated.
privacy.s5.5.title: 5.5 Email Services
privacy.s5.5.body: Transactional emails (intake notifications, client confirmations, document requests) are sent via Resend. Email content is transmitted securely and is not stored by the email provider beyond delivery.
privacy.s5.6.title: 5.6 Analytics
privacy.s5.6.body: We use Google Analytics 4 to collect anonymized usage data on our marketing websites and platform. Analytics data is not linked to individual client intake records.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Data Security
privacy.s6.intro: We implement robust technical and organizational security measures to protect your information:
privacy.s6.items: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+ and at rest using AES-256 encryption
Database access is governed by Row Level Security (RLS) policies — professionals can only access their own data
Client document storage uses private, encrypted buckets with access-controlled policies
No employee, contractor, or representative of SoloSolutionsAI views, reads, or reviews client intake data or uploaded documents — all processing is fully automated
API rate limiting is enforced to prevent abuse
CORS policies restrict access to authorized domains only
Integration tokens (HubSpot, Calendly) are encrypted and stored securely
privacy.s7.title: 7. Data Retention
privacy.s7.professional: Professional accounts: Account information is retained for as long as your account is active. You may request account deletion at any time.
privacy.s7.client: Client intake records: Intake submissions, conversation transcripts, and AI-generated summaries are retained unless the professional or client requests deletion. Professionals can manage and delete intake records from their admin portal.
privacy.s7.documents: Uploaded documents: Client-uploaded documents and their AI-generated summaries are automatically deleted from our systems 30 days after upload. SoloSolutionsAI is designed as a pass-through service, not a permanent document repository. Professionals are responsible for downloading and retaining any documents they need within this window.
privacy.s7.integration: Integration data: OAuth tokens for connected services (HubSpot, Calendly) are retained until the professional disconnects the integration. Data that has been synced to third-party services is governed by those services' retention policies.
privacy.s7.deletion: Right to deletion: Clients may request immediate deletion of their data, including intake records and uploaded documents, at any time by contacting privacy@solosolutionsai.com. Upon receiving a valid request, we will delete the relevant data from our systems. Note: data already synced to third-party services (HubSpot, webhooks) must be deleted by the professional from those services directly.
privacy.s8.title: 8. Profession-Specific Considerations
privacy.s8.intro: SoloSolutionsAI serves professionals across multiple regulated and unregulated industries. The following considerations apply:
privacy.s8.1.title: 8.1 Legal Professionals
privacy.s8.1.body: SoloSolutionsAI is a software tool only. Use of the Service does not create an attorney-client relationship. Attorneys are responsible for ensuring their use of the platform complies with applicable rules of professional conduct, ethics rules, and client confidentiality requirements in their jurisdiction. Data retention requirements vary by state bar — attorneys should download and retain intake records according to their jurisdictional requirements.
privacy.s8.2.title: 8.2 Mental Health Professionals
privacy.s8.2.body: The Service is designed for initial client onboarding and lead capture — not for clinical documentation, treatment planning, or session notes. The AI intake conversation does not constitute a therapeutic session. Therapists and counselors are responsible for ensuring their use of the platform complies with applicable licensing board requirements and patient confidentiality obligations. The Service is not intended to be HIPAA-compliant and should not be used to collect protected health information (PHI) as defined by HIPAA.
privacy.s8.3.title: 8.3 Social Workers
privacy.s8.3.body: Social workers using the Service should ensure compliance with the NASW Code of Ethics regarding client confidentiality and informed consent. The Service supports initial intake and inquiry capture — it is not a case management system.
privacy.s8.4.title: 8.4 Healthcare and Veterinary Professionals
privacy.s8.4.body: The Service captures initial client/patient owner information for onboarding purposes. It is not an electronic health records (EHR) system and should not be used to store medical records, diagnoses, or treatment plans. AI-generated intelligence briefs are informational tools and do not constitute medical or veterinary diagnosis.
privacy.s8.5.title: 8.5 Financial Professionals
privacy.s8.5.body: Accountants and insurance professionals are responsible for ensuring compliance with applicable financial privacy regulations. Our data boundary enforcement actively blocks collection of financial account numbers, Social Security Numbers, and other sensitive financial identifiers during intake.
privacy.s8.6.title: 8.6 All Professions
privacy.s8.6.body: Regardless of profession, all professionals using SoloSolutionsAI are solely responsible for ensuring their use of the platform complies with applicable laws, regulations, professional standards, and ethical codes in their jurisdiction. SoloSolutionsAI provides a technology platform — it does not provide legal, medical, financial, or professional advice of any kind.
privacy.s9.title: 9. Your Rights
privacy.s9.intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:
privacy.s9.access: Access: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you
privacy.s9.correction: Correction: Request correction of inaccurate information
privacy.s9.deletion: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal information
privacy.s9.portability: Portability: Request your data in a structured, machine-readable format
privacy.s9.objection: Objection: Object to processing of your information for certain purposes
privacy.s9.restriction: Restriction: Request that we limit how we use your information
privacy.s9.withdrawal: Withdrawal of consent: Withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent
privacy.s9.footer: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@solosolutionsai.com. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.s10.title: 10. US State Privacy Laws
privacy.s10.intro: We comply with applicable US state privacy laws, including:
privacy.s10.ccpa: California (CCPA/CPRA): California residents have the right to know what personal information is collected, request deletion, and opt out of the sale of personal information. We do not sell personal information.
privacy.s10.other: Virginia (VCDPA), Colorado (CPA), Connecticut (CTDPA): Residents of these states have similar rights to access, correction, deletion, and portability of their personal information.
privacy.s10.footer: We do not sell, share for cross-context behavioral advertising, or use personal information for profiling in furtherance of decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects.
privacy.s11.title: 11. International Users and Data Transfers
privacy.s11.intro: SoloSolutionsAI is operated by SPD Digital Consulting LLC, based in the United States. All data is currently stored and processed in the United States (AWS US-East-1 region via Supabase).
privacy.s11.1.title: 11.1 United Kingdom
privacy.s11.1.body1: For users in the United Kingdom, personal data is transferred to the United States under the UK-US Data Bridge framework, which provides adequate safeguards for the transfer of personal data from the UK to certified US organizations. We process personal data based on: (a) contractual necessity — to provide the Service you have requested; (b) legitimate interests — to operate, maintain, and improve our platform; or (c) your explicit consent.
privacy.s11.1.body2: Your rights under UK GDPR include: access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, objection to processing, and the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) at ico.org.uk.
privacy.s11.2.title: 11.2 European Economic Area
privacy.s11.2.body: For users in the EEA, personal data is transferred to the United States under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. You have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority. The same lawful bases and data subject rights described in Section 11.1 apply.
privacy.s11.3.title: 11.3 Data Residency
privacy.s11.3.body: All data is currently stored in the United States. We are evaluating regional data residency options (including UK-based storage) for future availability. If you have specific data residency requirements, please contact us at privacy@solosolutionsai.com.
privacy.s11.consent: By using the Service, you acknowledge and consent to the transfer and processing of your information in the United States in accordance with this Privacy Policy and applicable data transfer frameworks.
privacy.s12.title: 12. Children's Privacy
privacy.s12.body: The Service is not intended for individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected information from a minor, please contact us immediately at privacy@solosolutionsai.com.
privacy.s13.title: 13. Changes to This Policy
privacy.s13.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered professionals of material changes by email and by posting the updated policy on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s14.title: 14. Contact Us
privacy.s14.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, wish to exercise your rights, or have concerns about our data practices, please contact us at:
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.s1.body: By accessing or using SoloSolutionsAI ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service. These Terms apply to all users, including professionals who create accounts ("Professionals") and individuals who submit information through intake conversations ("Clients").
terms.s2.title: 2. Description of Service
terms.s2.body: SoloSolutionsAI provides an AI-powered client intake and onboarding platform for solo practitioners and small businesses across multiple professions. The Service includes: conversational AI intake (chat and phone), AI-generated summaries and intelligence briefs, email notifications, client submission management, document upload and AI analysis, marketing content generation (blog posts, social media copy, visual cards), third-party integrations (HubSpot CRM, Zapier, webhooks, Calendly), and website widget embedding.
terms.s3.title: 3. Account Registration
terms.s3.intro: To use the Service as a Professional, you must:
terms.s3.items: Be a licensed, certified, or qualified professional in your field (where applicable)
Provide accurate and complete registration information
Maintain the security of your account credentials
Be responsible for all activities under your account
Promptly update your account information if it changes
terms.s3.footer: You may not create an account on behalf of another person or entity without their authorization. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that contain false or misleading information.
terms.s4.title: 4. Subscription and Billing
terms.s4.1.title: 4.1 Plans and Pricing
terms.s4.1.body: The Service is offered in multiple subscription tiers (Starter, Pro, and Pro+), each with different feature access levels and usage limits. Current pricing and feature details are available on our pricing page. We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days' advance notice.
terms.s4.2.title: 4.2 Free Trial
terms.s4.2.body: All plans include a 14-day free trial with full Pro+ access. You will not be charged until your trial ends. If you do not select a paid plan before the trial expires, your account will be moved to the Starter tier.
terms.s4.3.title: 4.3 Payment
terms.s4.3.body: Payments are processed securely through Stripe. By subscribing to a paid plan, you authorize us to charge your payment method on a recurring basis. You are responsible for keeping your payment information current.
terms.s4.4.title: 4.4 Cancellation and Refunds
terms.s4.4.body: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Upon cancellation, your access continues through the end of your current billing period. No prorated refunds are issued for partial billing periods. You may manage your subscription through the Stripe Customer Portal accessible from your account settings.
terms.s5.title: 5. Acceptable Use
terms.s5.items: Use the Service for any illegal purpose or in violation of any applicable laws or regulations
Submit, collect, or store information that you are not authorized to collect

Attempt to circumvent data boundary enforcement mechanisms (e.g., intentionally collecting prohibited data types such as Social Security Numbers, credit card numbers, or government IDs through modified intake questions)
Use the Service to send spam, unsolicited communications, or harass individuals
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service, other accounts, or related systems
Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the Service
Resell, redistribute, or sublicense the Service without our written consent
Use the Service in a manner that could damage, disable, or impair our infrastructure
Use AI-generated content (blog posts, marketing copy) in a misleading or deceptive manner
Misrepresent AI-generated summaries or intelligence briefs as your own professional analysis
terms.s6.title: 6. AI Disclosure and Limitations
terms.s6.1.title: 6.1 Nature of AI Services
terms.s6.1.body: SoloSolutionsAI uses artificial intelligence (powered by Anthropic Claude) to conduct intake conversations, generate summaries, produce intelligence briefs, analyze documents, and create marketing content. AI-generated content is produced algorithmically and may contain errors, omissions, or inaccuracies.
terms.s6.2.title: 6.2 Not Professional Advice
terms.s6.2.body: IMPORTANT: AI-generated summaries, intelligence briefs, context notes, document analyses, and any other AI output provided through the Service do not constitute legal advice, medical advice, financial advice, therapeutic guidance, or professional counsel of any kind. All AI output is informational only and is intended to assist — not replace — the professional's own judgment, analysis, and expertise.
terms.s6.3.title: 6.3 Professional Responsibility
terms.s6.3.body: Professionals are solely responsible for reviewing AI-generated content before acting on it, making their own professional assessments, and ensuring their use of the Service complies with all applicable professional standards, licensing requirements, and ethical codes.
terms.s6.4.title: 6.4 AI-Generated Marketing Content
terms.s6.4.body: Blog posts and marketing content generated through the Service are created by AI based on your profession, specialties, and location. You are responsible for reviewing all generated content for accuracy, appropriateness, and compliance with advertising regulations applicable to your profession before publishing.
terms.s7.title: 7. Professional Relationship Disclaimer
terms.s7.intro: IMPORTANT: SoloSolutionsAI is a software tool only. Use of this Service does not create a professional-client relationship of any kind between SoloSolutionsAI and either the Professional or the Client. Specifically:
terms.s7.items: For attorneys: Use of the Service does not create an attorney-client relationship. Establishing such a relationship is the sole responsibility of the attorney in accordance with their jurisdiction's rules of professional conduct.

For therapists and counselors: The AI intake conversation does not constitute a therapeutic session, clinical assessment, or treatment. Establishing a therapeutic relationship is the sole responsibility of the licensed professional.
For social workers: The intake process does not constitute a social work assessment, intervention, or case management activity.
For healthcare and veterinary professionals: AI-generated intelligence briefs do not constitute medical or veterinary diagnoses, and should not be treated as clinical recommendations.
For financial professionals: The Service does not provide financial, tax, or insurance advice. All professional determinations are the responsibility of the licensed professional.

For all professions: Clients submitting intake information are prospective clients of the Professional, not clients of SoloSolutionsAI. The Professional is solely responsible for the professional relationship.
terms.s8.title: 8. Third-Party Integrations
terms.s8.intro: The Service allows Professionals to connect third-party services including HubSpot, Zapier, Make, custom webhook endpoints, and Calendly. By connecting a third-party integration:
terms.s8.items: You authorize SoloSolutionsAI to transmit intake data to the connected service as configured
You are solely responsible for the privacy, security, and compliance of data once it reaches the third-party service
You acknowledge that third-party services are governed by their own terms of service and privacy policies
You are responsible for informing your clients that their data may be shared with third-party services and obtaining any required consent
SoloSolutionsAI is not liable for data breaches, misuse, or policy violations by third-party services
terms.s9.title: 9. Document Uploads
terms.s9.intro: The Service allows Professionals to request documents from Clients, which Clients may upload voluntarily. By using this feature:
terms.s9.items: AI Analysis: Uploaded documents are processed by AI to generate structured summaries for the requesting Professional. These summaries are informational only and do not constitute professional analysis or advice.
No Human Review: No employee, contractor, or representative of SoloSolutionsAI views, reads, or reviews uploaded documents. All processing is fully automated.
Limited Retention: Uploaded documents and AI summaries are automatically deleted 30 days after upload. SoloSolutionsAI is not a document storage service.
Access Control: Documents are accessible only to the Professional who requested them. Documents are encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES-256).
Deletion Rights: Clients may request immediate deletion of uploaded documents at any time by contacting privacy@solosolutionsai.com.
terms.s9.footer: Professional Responsibility: Professionals are responsible for ensuring that requesting, receiving, and storing client documents complies with all applicable professional conduct rules, confidentiality obligations, and data protection laws in their jurisdiction.
terms.s10.title: 10. Data Ownership
terms.s10.p1: You retain ownership of all data you input into the Service. By using the Service, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive license to process your data solely to provide, maintain, and improve the Service. We do not claim ownership of your intake data, documents, or generated content.
terms.s10.p2: AI-generated content (summaries, intelligence briefs, blog posts, marketing copy) created through the Service is provided to you for your use. You may use, modify, and publish this content as you see fit, subject to your professional and legal obligations.
terms.s11.title: 11. Disclaimer of Warranties
terms.s11.body: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR-FREE, SECURE, OR FREE OF HARMFUL COMPONENTS. WE DO NOT WARRANT THE ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, OR RELIABILITY OF ANY AI-GENERATED CONTENT. WE DO NOT PROVIDE LEGAL, MEDICAL, FINANCIAL, OR PROFESSIONAL ADVICE OF ANY KIND.
terms.s12.title: 12. Limitation of Liability
terms.s12.p1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, SOLOSOLUTIONSAI AND ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO: LOSS OF REVENUE, LOSS OF DATA, LOSS OF CLIENTS, PROFESSIONAL LIABILITY CLAIMS, OR REGULATORY ACTIONS ARISING FROM USE OF THE SERVICE.
terms.s12.p2: OUR TOTAL LIABILITY FOR ANY CLAIMS ARISING UNDER THESE TERMS SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID FOR THE SERVICE IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.
terms.s13.title: 13. Indemnification
terms.s13.body: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless SoloSolutionsAI from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, or expenses (including reasonable attorney's fees) arising from: (a) your use of the Service; (b) your violation of these Terms; (c) your violation of any applicable law or regulation; (d) your violation of any professional or ethical obligation; or (e) any claim by a third party (including your clients) related to your use of the Service or data shared through integrations you have configured.
terms.s14.title: 14. Termination
terms.s14.p1: You may cancel your subscription and close your account at any time. Upon cancellation, your access continues through the end of your current billing period.
terms.s14.p2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account for violation of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or any reason with reasonable notice. In the event of termination, we will provide you with a reasonable opportunity to export your data.
terms.s14.p3: Upon account deletion, we will delete your account information, intake records, and associated data from our systems, subject to any legal retention requirements and our data retention policy.
terms.s15.title: 15. Changes to Terms
terms.s15.body: We may modify these Terms at any time. We will notify registered Professionals of material changes by email at least 30 days before the changes take effect. Continued use of the Service after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. If you do not agree with the revised Terms, you must stop using the Service and close your account.
terms.s16.title: 16. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
terms.s16.p1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida, United States, without regard to conflict of law provisions.
terms.s16.p2: Any dispute arising under these Terms shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association, conducted in the State of Florida. You agree to waive any right to a jury trial or to participate in a class action.
terms.s17.title: 17. Miscellaneous
terms.s17.entire: Entire Agreement: These Terms, together with the Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and SoloSolutionsAI.
terms.s17.severability: Severability: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
terms.s17.waiver: Waiver: Failure to enforce any provision of these Terms does not constitute a waiver of that provision.
terms.s17.assignment: Assignment: You may not assign or transfer your rights under these Terms without our written consent. We may assign our rights and obligations without restriction.
terms.s18.title: 18. Contact
terms.s18.body: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at:

blog.ctaTitle: Ready to modernize your intake process?
